content:
🚀 app-store-screenshots | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Automating the creation of professional, marketing-ready App Store and Google Play screenshots using AI.
✨ Key Features: • AI-powered screenshot generation for App Store and Google Play • Connected canvas editor for seamless element spanning • Real device frames for iOS, iPad, Android, and Play Store formats
📖 Summary: This repository provides a Next.js-based editor for generating App Store and Google Play marketing screenshots. It leverages AI coding agents to automate the creation of visually appealing and store-ready screenshot decks, complete with device frames, captions, and connected canvas layouts.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
